entry.title: Potential Role of Brown Macroalgae on Pig Health: A Review

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: GD Satessa, P Khanal - ACS Nutrition Science, 2026

Abstract: ... Alginate has considerable prebiotic potential as a nondigestible dietary fiber that can be used for the manipulation of gut microbiota and the reduction of blood cholesterol levels. (184) It is characterized by nonenzymatic oxidative ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life

entry.title: The Role of Chemistry Across Disciplines From Humanities to Life Sciences in Understanding Complexity and Emergence

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: H Schwalbe, J Wachtveitl, A Heckel, F Buhr, S Toews... - ... Chemie International Edition, 2026

Abstract: ... Chemistry, biology, and philosophy each contribute in distinct but complementary ways to understanding the origin of life . These contributions show how complexity arises from basic building blocks and how prebiotic chemistry creates natural ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life

entry.title: Coffee Silverskin Supplementation Alleviates High-Glucose-Diet-Induced Obesity by Modulating Lipogenic Gene Expression in Caenorhabditis elegans Model

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: E Schifano, P Zinno, F Natella, L Pompa, E Sonaglia... - Molecules, 2026

Abstract: Coffee silverskin (CSS), the major by-product of coffee roasting, is reported to contain bioactive compounds, including xanthines and polyphenols, showing promising potential for food and nutraceutical applications. This study investigated ...

entry.title: Effect of Replacement of Antibiotic with Probiotic and Prebiotic on Growth Performance, Carcass Characteristics, And Nutrient Digestibility in Broilers

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: S Hassan, M Sharif, A Raza, F Ahmad

Abstract: The purpose of this study was to assess how probiotics and prebiotics, as opposed to antibiotic growth boosters, affected the growth performance, carcass features, and nutrient digestibility of broiler chickens. Day-old broiler chicks were randomized to ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life

entry.title: Trade-Offs in Organic Wheat: Lower Protein Quality Versus Enhanced Prebiotic Oligosaccharides

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: TR Piskackova, AM Bergo, L Jurkaninova, J Havlik - Journal of agricultural and food ...

Abstract: Wheat is a major staple crop, and interest in its organic cultivation is growing. This study aimed to compare the technological and nutritional quality of winter wheat grown in organic and conventional systems. Sixteen varieties were evaluated using ...

entry.title: Comment on "On the emergence of preferred structures in quantum theory" by Soulas, Franzmann, and Di Biagio
entry.content:
Authors: C Stoica

Journal: 2026

Abstract: ... fixing an absolute TPS, as normally done in quantum theory, but by more complicated means that may give the impression of emergence . ... In addition to this, if we could claim that fixing the invariants that classify the solutions is unique ...

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)
